title: Planning closeout affordance
goal: Make planning closeout values and closed-state routing valid by construction for GitHub #614, #615, and #616.
non_goals: Do not change unrelated planning workflow semantics.

intent.outcome: Agents can author closed planning rows and execplan closeout records without discovering terminal vocabulary only through failed archive validation.
intent.constraints: Keep package bootstrap payloads and installed repo payloads in sync.
intent.latitude: Use compact schema, template, README, and summary affordance changes that match existing planning surfaces.
intent.escalation: Stop if the lane requires external host-repo dogfooding.

execution.next_step: archive the plan and close GitHub #614, #615, and #616.
execution.proof: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json

invariants: Closed state rows use maturity=closed with status done or dismissed plus explicit durable residue or closure routing.
Execplan durable_residue status vocabulary matches archive validation.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Planning closeout should be cheap, explicit, and recoverable without hidden terminal values.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Keep schema, template, README, and archive-validation vocabularies synchronized when adding closeout fields.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package is used while it is being changed, so hidden terminal values become expensive immediately.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: if another closeout value drift appears

signals found: Dogfooding finding: durable_residue.status accepted pending in schema but archive rejected it.
Dogfooding finding: closeout terminal values were easier to discover from archive failures than from the template.
Dogfooding finding: closed planning-state rows need a copyable terminal scaffold in compact health output.
signals fixed: Schema and archive validation now agree that durable_residue.status does not include pending.
Execplan templates and README now expose accepted closure terminal values before archive validation.
planning_surface_health now carries a closed_work_item_scaffold and closed-row warnings use it as the suggested fix.
signals routed: Dogfooding observation outside this lane: compact summary reports roadmap lanes through the roadmap.candidates field when no explicit candidates exist.
